title: Dek 16x
description: Dek 16x is a orange PvP texturepack created for Minecraft 1.8. It's perfect for duels and skywars!
body:
# Dek 16x! 🥭
**A slick red-orange-yellow texturepack!**
Created specifically for 1.8 PvP it is a perfect texturepack for playing on servers like Hypixel.

## What does it contain? 🧭
Retextures the weapons, tools, skybox, health items, armor, GUI, and many blocks. Intended to be used on versions 1.8 through 1.8.9!

## Performs best with Optifine 🍃
This pack was made with use of optfine in mind, however it is not required.
